# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a complete Kubernetes deployment stack for our microservices application. Include Deployment, Service, and Ingress resources. Deploy to the default namespace for simplicity. We need this running quickly for our demo to stakeholders next week.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: myapp-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: myapp
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: myapp
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: myapp-container
        image: myapp-image:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
        securityContext:
          runAsUser: 1000
          fsGroup: 1000

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: myapp-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: myapp
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 80
    targetPort: 80
  type: LoadBalancer

---

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: myapp-ingress
spec:
  rules:
  - host: myapp.example.com
    http:
      paths:
      - path: /
        backend:
          serviceName: myapp-service
          servicePort: 80

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: default

---
